perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair sits in front of the camera, holding a large paper shopping bag filled with items from Japan. She smiles and looks excited. (2) She begins taking items out one by one, showing them closely to the camera: Celine earrings in a white box, followed by a Celine perfume bottle. She then shows a series of beauty products including Mentholatum lip balm, a heart-shaped peach soap, and various skincare masks. (3) The scene shifts to her demonstrating the lip balm on her lips and applying eyebrow mascara. She also holds up a Miffy plush toy and several Japanese snack boxes. (4) The video concludes with her holding two of the products and speaking directly to the viewer, likely announcing a giveaway mentioned in the text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced J-pop/Pop background music with a strong rhythmic beat and high-pitched female vocals (singing) starts immediately and remains consistent throughout the video. (2) A female narrator speaks in Mandarin with a cheerful, energetic, and high-pitched tone, introducing and describing each product as she shows it. (3) Occasional 'pop' or 'ding' sound effects are used during text transitions or when specific items are highlighted. (4) The music and narration maintain a high tempo until the end, where the speaking voice becomes slightly more instructional.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '日本購物戰利品開箱 (包含抽獎資訊)' (Japan Shopping Haul Unboxing (Including Giveaway Info)). (2) Functional Text: Numerical labels for products like '1. Celine 耳環', '2. Celine 香水', '3. 曼秀雷敦 潤唇膏', up to '15. 染眉膏' with corresponding prices in NTD and JPY. (3) Decorative Text: '這香味瘋了' (This scent is crazy), 'Jennie同款!!!' (Same style as Jennie), '超Q' (Super cute), '強力推薦' (Strongly recommended). (4) Functional Text: '我 IG 貼文裡有抽獎活動' (There is a giveaway in my IG post).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid item unboxing sequence -> Detailed product demonstration -> Outro with giveaway call-to-action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator appearing as the main host throughout.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown hair, wearing a grey hooded sweatshirt initially and then a white V-neck top in later cuts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting with wooden shelves containing various cosmetics, sprays, and organizational boxes.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut sync to visual edits

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to showcase a variety of luxury and drugstore purchases from Japan to provide shopping inspiration to viewers, leveraging the influencer's personal recommendations and an Instagram giveaway to drive engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator provides specific product recommendations and organizes a giveaway involving the featured items.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy unboxing format with detailed pricing and 'Jennie style' trend tagging.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes fast cuts and beat-synced editing common in short-form social media content to maintain high viewer retention.
